heroHeadline: Day 38: BBC Details US Airman Rescue Op in Remote Iran; Hegseth Confirms Strikes Intensifying as Hormuz Deadline Looms
heroSubtitle: BBC reveals CSAR operational specifics for US airman rescued from remote Iran. US-Israeli air campaign escalating ahead of Strait of Hormuz deadline — civilian toll rising. N. Korea won't back Tehran.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC.
